title: Brazilian Salmon Bowl
description: A flavorful and healthy Brazilian-inspired dish featuring grilled salmon and garlicky rice.
instructions: Season the salmon fillets with salt and pepper.
Grill the salmon for 4-5 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Cook the garlicky rice according to package instructions.
In a small bowl, whisk together kissed olive oil, salt, and pepper.
To assemble the bowls, place a scoop of rice on the bottom, followed by a piece of grilled salmon, and drizzle with the olive oil mixture.
